name: SomeIpRemoveEvent
title: SomeIpRemoveEvent
description: Removes an Event from a Provided Service Instance. The Event was previously added by SomeIpAddEvent.
Afterwards, the callback registered with SomeIpAddEvent is no longer called. The Event is no longer sent by the SOME/IP IL.

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that is to be removed. The handle must have been created with SomeIpAddEvent.
